name: Welcome to your fantasy world
description:
Ep4 of my open world series.

Do feel free and give suggestions for more episodes.

In this world, be anything you want.

A ruler of a distant land coming back to reclaim glory and riches

A god that wants to live among mortals. Or one that wants to prove their spot in the high heavens

A disgraceful knight who cannot do anything but lounge around and let the others do the heavy lifting?

Whichever side you choose. Whatever you pick, whatever you become.

This series never puts a limiter on who or what you are. So go wild.
creator: Continento
